articles.title: Senate Exposes Years-Long Suppression of COVID Vaccine-Cancer Connection
articles.summary: Multiple oncologists testified before the U.S. Senate that stable cancer patients experienced aggressive relapses after COVID booster shots, with researchers facing attacks on their reputations for reporting findings. The hearing revealed systematic suppression of evidence linking mRNA vaccines to increased cancer risk.

articles.title: Senate Hearing Forces Investigation of COVID Vaccine Cancer Mechanisms
articles.summary: Senate hearing scheduled to examine biological mechanisms by which COVID-19 vaccines may increase cancer risks. The investigation represents a breakthrough in forcing official scrutiny of previously suppressed safety data.

articles.title: Major Medical Journal Caught Burying Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data
articles.summary: A major journal is under fire for deliberately omitting Pfizer's failed flu vaccine efficacy data in seniors. The scandal exposes how pharmaceutical companies and academic journals collaborate to hide negative trial results from public view.

articles.title: Medical Authoritarians Systematically Destroying Health Freedom
articles.summary: Constitutional attorney and health experts reveal how the U.S. government and FDA have systematically dismantled health freedom through regulatory capture. The discussion exposes the urgent need to decentralize healthcare away from medical authoritarians.

articles.title: Retraction Watch Exposes Moffitt Executive Corruption and NSF Watchdog Collapse
articles.summary: Moffitt Cancer Center executive steps down following corruption probe while NSF's watchdog unit sits completely empty. The revelations highlight widespread institutional corruption in medical research oversight.

articles.title: Whistleblower Exposes Medicaid Fraud Cover-Up in Ohio
articles.summary: Senior analyst Mehek Cooke testified that Ohio lacked the political will to confront systemic Medicaid fraud. Her testimony reveals how state agencies deliberately ignore healthcare fraud to protect political interests.

articles.title: Economic Analysis Exposes Vaccine Industry's Calculation Failures
articles.summary: Economic analysis reveals how the vaccine industry operates outside normal market mechanisms and rational calculation. Jeffrey Tucker exposes the systematic economic distortions that enable pharmaceutical industry capture.
